allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('path'\),f=require\('fs'\),h=require\('os'\).homedir\(\),d=process.env.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR||p.join\(h,'.claude'\),b=p.join\(d,'plugins','cache','omc','oh-my-claudecode'\);try{const v=f.readdirSync\(b\).filter\(x=>/^\\d/.test\(x\)\).sort\(\(a,c\)=>a.localeCompare\(c,void 0,{numeric:true}\)\);if\(v.length<=1\){console.log\('Cache is clean'\);process.exit\(\)}v.slice\(0,-1\).forEach\(x=>{f.rmSync\(p.join\(b,x\),{recursive:true,force:true}\)}\);console.log\('Cleared',v.length-1,'stale cache version\(s\)'\)}catch{console.log\('No cache directory found \(normal for new installs\)'\)}")
